examples.english: will certainly eat from ˹the fruit of˺ the trees of Zaqqûm.

senses.gloss: Egyptian balsam (Balanites aegyptiacus fruit and tree)

examples.text: المعسكر الذي تقبع به سلطات قطر وتركيا وإيران في النازل لا الطالع، تحصد الزقوم وتتجرع العلقم وتضرس الحصرم على أسنان نخرة.
examples.english: The camp in which the powers of Qaṭar, Turkey, and Iran trumpet is descending, not ascending; they reap the Egyptian balsam, gorge the colocynth, and chomp on sour grapes high-nosed.

senses.gloss: spurge (Euphorbia spp., including Euphorbia neriifolia, Euphorbia resinifera, Euphorbia abyssinica)

etymology.text: From the root ز ق م (z q m) related to gulping.
